body_excerpt: In TBD of TBD, there is a possible LCS signing enforcement missing  due to test/debugging code left in a production build. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In TBD of TBD, there is a possible LCS signing enforcement missing  due to test/debugging code left in a production build. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution
